title: Rabindra Bharati University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Rabindra Bharati University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Rabindra Bharati University Result 2026 out for 1st and 3rd semester MA Museology and Conservation, Journalism and Mass Communication, Musicology, Rabindra Sangeet and Dance (CBCS) on the official website - rbu.ac.in on 13-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the RBU result.

content.text: Rabindra Bharati University (RBU) has officially released the RBU Result 2026 for MA 1st and 3rd semester examinations 2025 in multiple postgraduate programmes including Museology and Conservation, Journalism and Mass Communication, Musicology, Rabindra Sangeet and Dance under the CBCS system. These results belong to the 2025 exam session and cover courses under the Faculty of Visual Arts, Faculty of Arts and Faculty of Fine Arts. RBU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - rbu.ac.in.

Students can visit the examinations section, open the latest MA result PDFs for their respective subjects and check their roll number, name, and marks or grade as notified by the university. After downloading or viewing the provisional result, students should cross-check all details carefully and contact the university examination branch in case of any discrepancy or doubt regarding their result.

sections.heading: Rabindra Bharati University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Rabindra Bharati University has uploaded separate result PDFs for each MA programme and semester, making it easier for students to find course-wise results from the examinations page. These RBU Result 2026 updates are particularly important for PG students in arts, fine arts and visual arts streams who appeared for the 1st and 3rd semester CBCS examinations in 2025 and are planning their next academic or research steps based on the outcome. Students can access the results directly through the official examinations section and use them as an official reference until mark sheets are issued.

rows: MA Museology and Conservation, MA Journalism and Mass Communication, MA Musicology, MA Rabindra Sangeet, MA Dance
Faculty of Visual Arts, Faculty of Arts, Faculty of Fine Arts
Roll Number / Name as printed on admit card (for checking in PDF)
Declared for mentioned MA CBCS courses under RBU Result 2026

sections.heading: Rabindra Bharati University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: RBU has provided direct PDF links for each MA CBCS result on its examinations page, allowing students to quickly access course-specific result documents. From the MA Museology and Conservation to MA Dance, all results are accessible via a single examinations portal where individual result files are listed by course name, semester and date. Students can use the links in the table below to open the official PDFs and verify their performance.

links.label: Result of MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Museology and Conservation (CBCS) under Faculty of Visual Arts - April 13 2026
Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Journalism and Mass Communication (CBCS) under Faculty of Arts - April 13 2026
Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Musicology (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts - April 13 2026
Result of MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts - April 13 2026
Result of MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Dance (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts - April 13 2026
Rabindra Bharati University Examinations Page - All Latest RBU Result Notices

content.text: Use the following steps to check and download your Rabindra Bharati University MA 1st and 3rd semester result:

items: Open the official RBU website in your browser: https://www.rbu.ac.in/
On the homepage, navigate to the "Examinations" section or directly go to https://www.rbu.ac.in/home/examinations/

In the examinations/results area, locate the latest result notifications dated 13 April 2026 for: MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Museology and Conservation (CBCS) MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Journalism and Mass Communication (CBCS) MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Musicology (CBCS) MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS) MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Dance (CBCS)
MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Museology and Conservation (CBCS)
MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Journalism and Mass Communication (CBCS)
MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Musicology (CBCS)
MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS)
MA 1st Sem Exam 2025 in Dance (CBCS)
Click on the respective result link for your course, which will open a PDF file in a new tab or window.
In the result PDF, use the search function (Ctrl+F) and type your roll number or name to quickly find your result entry.
Check your course name, semester, roll number, and marks or grade as mentioned in the PDF.
Download or print the PDF for future reference, and if any error or discrepancy is noticed, contact the RBU examination department or your department office as soon as possible.
